name: system-notification-logical-test-case-added
description: System default template for logical test case addition notifications
templateBody: {{event.userName}} added logical test case(s){{#if entity.tests}}: {{#each entity.tests}}{{#unless @first}}, {{/unless}}{{#if displayName}}{{displayName}}{{else}}{{name}}{{/if}}{{/each}}{{/if}} to Test Suite: {{entity.fullyQualifiedName}}
